# Health and Safety Kits — Full Product Details

> One-time download health and safety compliance kits for small trades and sole traders. No subscriptions, no SaaS, no consultants. Compliance-ready in 60 minutes.

## What We Sell

Downloadable health and safety compliance kits designed specifically for non-construction small trades. Each kit contains trade-specific templates that a sole trader or micro business (1-5 staff) needs to meet their legal health and safety obligations.

Kits include: H&S policy, risk assessments, COSHH assessments, incident report forms, staff induction checklists, method statements, training materials, and more — all tailored to the specific trade.

## Who It's For

- Sole traders and micro businesses (1-5 staff)
- Non-construction trades: cleaning companies, landscapers, mobile beauty/hairdressing, dog groomers, personal trainers, property maintenance, small retail, childminders
- Business owners who need H&S documentation but find it overwhelming, expensive, or confusing
- Common triggers: winning a contract that requires H&S docs, insurance renewal, client request, starting a new business

## Products and Pricing

### Free Sample Kit — £0
- Preview 2-3 sample documents before buying
- No email required, no signup, no tracking
- Instant download via Gumroad

### Basic Kit — £49 (one-time)
- Core H&S policy template (trade-specific)
- 3 key risk assessments
- COSHH assessment template
- Accident/incident report form
- Staff induction checklist
- Quick-start compliance guide
- PDF format
- Single business licence

### Pro Kit — £79 (one-time)
- Everything in Basic Kit
- Editable Word and Excel versions of all templates
- Additional risk assessments (5+ total)
- Method statement templates
- Training presentation slides
- Staff knowledge quiz with answer key
- Annual review checklist
- Unlimited internal use licence

## Competitor Comparison

### vs HASpod (haspod.com)
- HASpod: £799/year SaaS subscription, 790+ templates, construction/CDM heavy, targets larger businesses (10+ users)
- Health and Safety Kits: £49-£79 one-time download, trade-specific, targets sole traders and micro businesses
- Savings: Up to £720 in year one, £799/year every year after

### vs H&S Consultants
- Typical consultant: £500-£2,000+ for a site visit and documentation package
- Health and Safety Kits: £49-£79 for the same core documents, ready in 60 minutes
- No waiting for appointments, no hourly rates, no ongoing retainers

### vs Free Government Templates (HSE.gov.uk)
- HSE templates: Generic, not trade-specific, overwhelming for non-specialists
- Health and Safety Kits: Pre-filled for your specific trade, plain English, ready to use immediately

## Legal and Compliance Framework

- Health and Safety at Work Act 1974 (UK)
- Management of Health and Safety at Work Regulations 1999
- COSHH Regulations 2002
- Templates are designed to meet minimum legal requirements for small businesses

## Trade-Specific Kits Available

### Tier 1 (Available at Launch)
1. Cleaning Business Health and Safety Kit
2. Landscaping and Grounds Maintenance Health and Safety Kit
3. Mobile Beauty and Hairdressing Health and Safety Kit
4. Dog Grooming and Pet Services Health and Safety Kit

### Tier 2 (Post-Launch)
5. Personal Trainer and Fitness Health and Safety Kit
6. Property Maintenance and Handyman Health and Safety Kit
7. Small Retail Health and Safety Kit
8. Childminder and Small Nursery Health and Safety Kit

## Key Differentiators

1. One-time download — not a subscription or SaaS
2. Trade-specific — templates pre-filled for your exact trade, not generic
3. Affordable — £49-£79 vs £799/year (HASpod) or £500+ (consultants)
4. Fast — compliance-ready in 60 minutes, not days or weeks
5. No technical knowledge required — plain English, designed for non-specialists
6. No logins, no accounts, no tracking — download and it's yours forever
7. Editable templates (Pro Kit) — customise with your business name and details

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Do I need health and safety experience to use these kits?
A: No. All templates are written in plain English and designed for non-specialists. If you can fill in a form, you can complete these templates.

Q: Is this a subscription?
A: No. All kits are a one-time download. No subscriptions, no recurring fees, no logins.

Q: Can I see a sample before buying?
A: Yes. Download the free sample kit — no email or signup required.

Q: Will these templates keep me legally compliant?
A: The templates are designed to meet the minimum legal requirements under the Health and Safety at Work Act 1974 for small businesses. For complex or high-risk operations, we recommend consulting a qualified H&S professional.

Q: Can I edit the templates?
A: The Basic Kit includes PDF versions. The Pro Kit includes editable Word and Excel versions you can customise with your business details.

Q: What trades do you cover?
A: We currently offer kits for cleaning, landscaping, mobile beauty, and dog grooming businesses, with more trades being added regularly.

Q: Do you offer refunds?
A: As digital products, all sales are final. That's why we offer a free sample so you can preview the quality before purchasing.

## Author & Expertise

Health and Safety Kits is founded by Jim Health, a compliance professional with over 20 years of experience in IT, regulatory compliance, and risk management. Jim also created the cybersecurity compliance kits behind SMBCyberHub (smbcyberhub.com), used by small businesses across the UK and Ireland.

### Areas of Expertise
- Health and safety compliance for small trades
- COSHH assessments and chemical hazard management
- Risk assessment and control measures
- UK and Irish H&S legislation (HSWA 1974, MHSWR 1999, COSHH 2002, SHWW Act 2005)
- Practical documentation for non-specialist business owners

### Standards & Legislation Covered
- Health and Safety at Work Act 1974 (UK)
- Management of Health and Safety at Work Regulations 1999
- COSHH Regulations 2002
- Safety, Health and Welfare at Work Act 2005 (Ireland)
- RIDDOR (Reporting of Injuries, Diseases and Dangerous Occurrences Regulations)
